a.xlink:title: Run per-element precomputations before global internal-force assembly.
Compute active deformation gradient for one element.
Solve local thickness equation (C33) for one element.
Compute right Cauchy-Green tensor and its inverse for one element.
Build current covariant/contravariant basis vectors for one element.
Return the active-strain gamma at the current time step.
Compute elastic right Cauchy-Green tensor for one element.
Compute elastic second Piola-Kirchhoff stress for one element.
Compute elastic tangent tensor for one element.
Assemble total (active + elastic) stress for one element.
Compute total tangent tensor for one element.
Update through-thickness C33 contribution for one element.
Update current midsurface geometry cache for one element.
Broadcast updated vertex coordinates from owning ranks to all ranks that need them.
